category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Dovecot as an IMAP/POP3 server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Dovecot site; official docs use the Dovecot name.
docs_sources: Official Dovecot documentation is hosted at doc.dovecot.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Dovecot documentation for compiling from Git gives https://github.com/dovecot/core.git as the source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IMAP/POP3 server functionality; source_facts.executables list Dovecot administration and server commands.
